name: Bean Vegetable Medley
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen baby lima beans (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
Tips: This dish can be assembled and baked later. Add the boiling water just before baking. Baking time should be increased by 15 minutes when starting from a chilled temperature.
Green pepper cut into strips.  15-20 oz cans each.
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion, celery, and green pepper; cook slowly for 10 minutes until onions are softened but not browned.
3. Stir in tomatoes, kidney beans, barley, parsley, salt, basil, and black pepper.
4. Transfer mixture to a buttered casserole with a lid that is 2- to 3 quarts.
5. Add boiling water so the ingredients are covered by about an inch of water.
6. Cover and bake at 350 degrees F for 1-1/2 hours or until barley is tender and liquid has been absorbed.
7. Sprinkle grated cheese over the top before serving.
Good served with: Marinated, slightly blanched mixed vegetables, hot French bread, and butter.
